apps:property.name: hasTheWord
apps:property.value: {subject:"application received" subject:"thank you for applying" subject:"thank you for your application" subject:"offer letter" subject:"we received your application" subject:"application confirmation" subject:"application submitted" subject:"your application has been" subject:"thanks for applying" subject:"job offer" subject:"offer of employment" subject:"interview invitation" subject:"invitation to interview" subject:"application status update" subject:"update on your application"}

apps:property.name: doesNotHaveTheWord
apps:property.value: "credit card" loan membership webinar newsletter receipt "order confirmation" "event registration"
